questions.question: What two functions does a writable computed property require?
Which use case is a writable computed NOT recommended for?
options: Creating a proxy for Pinia store state
Performing async operations when the value is set

questions.question: What must the setter of a writable computed do to keep the computed value accurate?
options: Update the reactive sources that the getter reads from
Return the new value to update the internal cache
Emit an event so the parent can update its own state
